conservative.name: Traitor of Tarn
conservative.requirements:
8 power
Target living creature within medium range. The target must be either casting a shadow or suffering from one of your Grey Order spells

success.description: As above, and you may spend fortune points to add to the target's dice pool

boon.description: The target is unaware of your control until you force him to act

challenge.description: Effect: You steal the target's shadow and seize control of him. While this spell is recharging, you and the target both control his body. He acts normally on his turn, but on your turn you may act through him, using his characteristics, talents, and actions. If you take actions both through the target and yourself in the same turn, each additional action suffers . You can't force the target to take extra maneuvers or directly injure himself

reckless.name: Traitor of Tarn
reckless.requirements:
8 power
Target living creature within medium range. The target must be either casting a shadow or suffering from one of your Grey Order spells

success.description: As above, and you may immediately take an action through the target

challenge.description: Effect: You steal the target's shadow and seize control of him. While this spell is recharging, you and the target both control his body. He acts normally on his turn, but on your turn you may act through him, using his characteristics, talents, and actions. If you take actions both through the target and yourself in the same turn, each additional action suffers . You can't force the target to take extra maneuvers or directly injure himself
